no: IWD EET Integration v1.2 by Subtledoctor. Connects IWD-in-EET campaigns with the main EET experience. All components require IWD1_EET or IWD2_EET to be installed. cn:110-160 require cn:100 (EET Menu). cn:150/155 also work with HoW_EET (https://github.com/The-Gate-Project/HoW_EET). cn:180 requires NWNForBG.

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

dependencies.reason: Most components require IWD1-in-EET to be installed

conflicts.reason: cn:180 adds NWN access after IWD1 campaign. Requires NWNForBG to be installed.

sum: Integration components connecting IWD-in-EET with the main EET experience: world map links, journal entries, and story hooks.

co.n: Add IWD Campaigns to the EET Menu
co.no: Adds IWD campaigns to the EET menu. REQUIRED by cn:110-180. Requires IWD1_EET cn:1 or IWD2_EET cn:0.

co.n: Adjust IWD1 XP for Full Campaign
co.no: Scales IWD1 XP rewards for integration with the full BG/IWD campaign progression. Requires IWD1_EET and cn:100.

co.n: Adjust IWD1 Creature Stats for Full Campaign
co.no: Adjusts IWD1 creature stats for full campaign difficulty balance. Requires IWD1_EET and cn:100.

co.n: Adjust IWD2 XP for Full Campaign
co.no: Scales IWD2 XP rewards for integration. Requires IWD2_EET and cn:100. Needs testing.

co.n: Adjust IWD2 Creature Stats for Full Campaign
co.no: Adjusts IWD2 creature stats for full campaign balance. Requires IWD2_EET and cn:100.
Adds Heart of Winter area access from BG2 world map. Requires IWD1_EET or HoW_EET.
Removes overpowered items from HoW to prevent balance issues in BG2. Requires IWD1_EET or HoW_EET.

co.n: Add IWD1 Easter Egg Content to BG2
co.no: Adds IWD1 easter egg content (Belhifet, etc.) accessible from BG2. Requires IWD1_EET.
Adds NWN campaign access after completing IWD1. Requires both IWD1_EET and NWNForBG.
